---
id: add-or-update-custom-metadata
title: "Add or update custom metadata"
description: "Associates custom metadata with a specific document. Custom metadata enables you to enrich documents with additional structured information that can be used for search, filtering, and faceting."
sidebar_label: "Add or update custom metadata"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: api/indexing-api/glean-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Add or update custom metadata"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/rest/api/index/document/{docId}/custom-metadata/{groupName}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Associates custom metadata with a specific document. Custom metadata enables you to enrich documents with additional structured information that can be used for search, filtering, and faceting.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
